title: Loops - The Most Important Chapter
story_hook: Instagram needs to show 1 million posts? One loop does it. This single chapter powers 70% of all coding interviews.

content.story: Instagram needs to show 1 million posts? One loop does it. This single chapter powers 70% of all coding interviews.

content.title: Loops Explained
content.focus_note: Watch nested loops carefully - they appear everywhere in FAANG.

content.doc_md:
for, while, do-while with real examples.

Loops = repeat the same logic without rewriting code.

visualizer.task: Watch a live counter increment and stop at conditions.
visualizer.notes: Notice how nested loops multiply work.

practice_problems.prompt: Sum of array elements using a loop.
Print a right triangle star pattern.
Find factorial of N with a loop.
Count digits of a number using a loop.

quiz_questions.question: Which loop is best when you know the count in advance?
quiz_questions.explanation: for loops are ideal for known iteration counts.

quiz_questions.question: Nested loops usually imply
quiz_questions.explanation: Two loops over n lead to n * n iterations.

quiz_questions.question: When does a while loop stop?
quiz_questions.explanation: while loops run until the condition fails.

content.task_prompt: Write a program to print all even numbers from 1 to N using a loop.

recall_questions: What is the difference between for and while loops?
Which loop would you use to traverse an array?
content.identity_affirmation: You can now repeat logic like a real programmer.
content.streak_reminder: Keep the streak alive - functions are next.
